What is the new section number for TDS o: Section 194A of the Income Tax Act 2025 introduced a new section number for TDS on salary: 194A(1A). This section applies to salary income earned by individuals and HUFs from employers, and it requires employers to deduct tax at source on salary. How does the Tax Year concept affect adv: The Tax Year concept is a crucial aspect of tax calculation in India. It determines the period over which tax is calculated. The Tax Year is the calendar year (2023-24) and the Financial Year is the accounting year (FY). The Tax Year affects advance tax calculation because it determines the period over which tax is calculated. For example, if you pay advance tax in FY 2023-24, it is based on FY 2023-24 tax rates. If you pay advance tax in FY 2024-25, it is based on FY 2024-25 tax rates. This ensures that taxpayers pay taxes based on the correct period.
What is faceless assessment under Income: Faceless assessment is a new feature introduced in the Income Tax Act 2025. It allows taxpayers to file their return online without providing their personal information. This feature is available for taxpayers filing under the old regime (2025-26 onwards) and new regime (2026-27 onwards). Faceless assessment is available for all tax regimes, including old and new.
